title: Swartberg fire remains uncontained
description: OUDTSHOORN NEWS - The wildfire on the...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS - The wildfire on the Swartberg Mountain near Oudtshoorn remains uncontained, with active fire behaviour continuing on both the southern and northern slopes.","html":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS - The wildfire on the Swartberg Mountain near Oudtshoorn remains uncontained, with active fire behaviour continuing on both the southern and northern slopes."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"On the southern side, fire activity persists in steep and difficult terrain."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Strong south-westerly winds are currently limiting suppression efforts, with active firelines estimated at approximately 2 to 3 kilometres.","html":"Strong south-westerly winds are currently limiting suppression efforts, with active firelines estimated at approximately 2 to 3 kilometres."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Firefighters will continue suppression efforts as conditions allow, particularly once wind speeds decrease.","html":"Firefighters will continue suppression efforts as conditions allow, particularly once wind speeds decrease."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"On the northern side, the fire has burned down from the mountain crest and is spreading slowly due to rocky terrain and sparse vegetation.","html":"On the northern side, the fire has burned down from the mountain crest and is spreading slowly due to rocky terrain and sparse vegetation."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The fire remains approximately 1.5km from a game farm fence, and at this stage no infrastructure is threatened during the current operational period.","html":"The fire remains approximately 1.5km from a game farm fence, and at this stage no infrastructure is threatened during the current operational period."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Aerial firefighting resources remain on standby as part of contingency planning, should conditions become favourable.","html":"Aerial firefighting resources remain on standby as part of contingency planning, should conditions become favourable."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Firefighting operations are being conducted by teams from Garden Route District Municipality, the Southern Cape Fire Protection Association, CapeNature, Working on Fire, and affected landowners.","html":"Firefighting operations are being conducted by teams from Garden Route District Municipality, the Southern Cape Fire Protection Association, CapeNature, Working on Fire, and affected landowners."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"If you spot a veld or wildfire, please report it immediately to the GRDM Emergency Call Centre on 044 805 5071 or via WhatsApp on 081 709 5193.","html":"If you spot a veld or wildfire, please report it immediately to the GRDM Emergency Call Centre on 044 805 5071 or via WhatsApp on 081 709 5193."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
